verses.1: A Song of degrees. Behold, bless ye the LORD, all ye servants of the LORD, who by night stand in the house of the LORD.
verses.2: Lift up your hands in the sanctuary, and bless the LORD.
verses.3: The LORD that made heaven and earth bless thee out of Zion.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
